title: Upload a meeting file
newProject: Create a project from a file
attachExisting: Attach a recording to a meeting
stages: Import one meeting file, then transcribe, translate, analyze, and create minutes.
selectedProject: Meeting to attach this recording to
singleFileNotice: Choose one meeting file. AccordMesh automatically splits long audio and video files during processing.
unsupportedSelection: The selected provider cannot process this file type.
demoSelectionNotice: The browser demo uses scripted MockProvider content and does not read or keep a local file.
noAttachableProjects: No completed live meetings are ready for a recording attachment.
recordingFileOnly: Choose an audio or video recording.
singleRecordingNotice: Attach one audio or video recording to a completed live meeting. Each meeting can have one attached recording.
